notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Braydon Fisher on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez reaches on a throwing error by first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Ketel Marte scores. Corbin Carroll to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez reaches on a throwing error by first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Ketel Marte scores. Corbin Carroll to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez reaches on a throwing error by first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Ketel Marte scores. Corbin Carroll to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez reaches on a throwing error by first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Ketel Marte scores. Corbin Carroll to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez reaches on a throwing error by first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Ketel Marte scores. Corbin Carroll to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Tyler Heineman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw grounds into a double play, second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Jose Fernandez. Tyler Heineman to 3rd. Nathan Lukes out at 2nd. Myles Straw out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw grounds into a double play, second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Jose Fernandez. Tyler Heineman to 3rd. Nathan Lukes out at 2nd. Myles Straw out at 1st.
